{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>15. Bey Herrn Haag dem Buchbinder in der Augustiner-Gaß sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ludwig Gottfrieds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Beschreibung von Schweden</TITLE>, mit viel schönen Kupferen, <PLACE>Franckfurt</PLACE> <YEAR>1632</YEAR>. <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rollin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Histoire Romaine</TITLE> <VOLUME>II. Tomes</VOLUME>, <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1744</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lightfooti</AUTHOR> <TITLE>horæ Hebr. in 4. Evang.</TITLE> <PLACE>Lipf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1684</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Eyusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>horæ Hebr. in fct. Rom. Cor.</TITLE> <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1679</YEAR></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stollens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anleit. zur Historie der Gelehrtheit</TITLE>, <PLACE>Jenä</PLACE> <YEAR>1727</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Walchn</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hist. Critica Ling. Lat.</TITLE> <PLACE>Lipf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Clericus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>in Pentateuch. & Libr. Hist. v. Test.</TITLE> <PLACE>Tubing.</PLACE> <YEAR>1733</YEAR>. <VOLUME>11. Tomi</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Ein Frantzösischer Atlas</TITLE> von <VOLUME>50. Carten</VOLUME></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":9,"explanation":"1. Fixed OCR artifact "Ga√ü" → "Gaß" (Augustiner-Gasse).
2. Fixed "IT. Tomes" → "II. Tomes" (Roman numeral OCR error in VOLUME).
3. Fixed "8v6" → "8vo" (OCR error in FORMAT, '6' misread for 'o').
4. Fixed "hori" → "horæ" (OCR error in first Lightfooti TITLE).
5. Fixed "hora" → "horæ" (OCR error in Eyusd. TITLE).
6. Fixed "Jen√§" → "Jenä" (OCR artifact for Jena).
7. Fixed "4t√≤" → "4to" (OCR artifact in FORMAT).
8. Fixed malformed tag "<TITLE=" → "<TITLE>" in the Clericus entry (the equals sign was erroneous, making invalid XML).
9. Fixed unescaped ampersand "&" → "&" in "Pentateuch. & Libr." to produce valid XML.
Additionally corrected OCR artifacts "sch√∂nen" → "schönen" and "Frantz√∂sischer" → "Frantzösischer" (Unicode rendering fixes)."}

parsed.explanation:
1. Fixed OCR artifact "Ga√ü" → "Gaß" (Augustiner-Gasse).
2. Fixed "IT. Tomes" → "II. Tomes" (Roman numeral OCR error in VOLUME).
3. Fixed "8v6" → "8vo" (OCR error in FORMAT, '6' misread for 'o').
4. Fixed "hori" → "horæ" (OCR error in first Lightfooti TITLE).
5. Fixed "hora" → "horæ" (OCR error in Eyusd. TITLE).
6. Fixed "Jen√§" → "Jenä" (OCR artifact for Jena).
7. Fixed "4t√≤" → "4to" (OCR artifact in FORMAT).
8. Fixed malformed tag "<TITLE=" → "<TITLE>" in the Clericus entry (the equals sign was erroneous, making invalid XML).
9. Fixed unescaped ampersand "&" → "&" in "Pentateuch. & Libr." to produce valid XML.
Additionally corrected OCR artifacts "sch√∂nen" → "schönen" and "Frantz√∂sischer" → "Frantzösischer" (Unicode rendering fixes).
